text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I join T.M. Opera O for the rehearsal for her New
Year's performance, which will be held at her
parents' house.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: La la la! ♪Oh? Who do we have here?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Well met, Ayabe. I see my siren song has lured
you here! What say you to watching the rehearsal
for my New Year's performance?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Huh? No.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Heh, she's merely trying not to seem overeager.
After all, it's not every day one can watch a
performance exclusive to family members!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha ha! What a glorious day! It's naught
but clear skies for this year's performance, and
the entire world is my stage!

text_block_list.name: Opera O's Younger Sister
text_block_list.text: Clap, clap, clap! I've been so excited for this! Oh, and you're using the props I made!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Your design skills are as splendid as ever!
Take that rose, for example—one would hardly
think it's origami.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Now then, it's almost showtime, and yet...

text_block_list.name: Opera O's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Sorry I'm late, dear! I got held up at work! Who
would've thought the grocery store would be so
busy on New Year's?

text_block_list.name: Opera O's Father
text_block_list.text:
There were crowds everywhere. It's a good thing I
decided to drive over and pick you up. Oh, we
got some New Year's dishes and amazake as well.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Mother, Father... You're right on time! Now, let's raise the curtains on this year's extra special New Year's home performance! I call it Dawn of the Overlord!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Laaa la la la la laaa! ♪ The Overlord cometh! The
Overlord goeth! ♪ The new year is here! ♪

text_block_list.name: Opera O's Father
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha! What a great opening number! Watching
this performance always motivates me to give it
my all each year!

text_block_list.name: Opera O's Younger Sister
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe! The new year hasn't really begun until
we've seen Opera O's New Year's performance,
huh? ♪

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...What a carefree lot.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: They certainly are!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Everyone's so warm, loving, overflowing with
kindness... On top of that, the depth and breadth
of their knowledge of the arts is vast...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Are they not a truly magnificent family? Their
love nurtured and shaped the Overlord. It is
thanks to them I can bathe the world in light...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Putting on this home performance is my way of
expressing my love and appreciation for them.
choice_data_list: It's clear how much you love your family.
It's clear how much you love your family.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Loud and clear.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hm? Oh, speak of the devil!

text_block_list.name: Opera O's Younger Sister
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Sis! It's me! Have you finished packing? Are
you going to make it back home in time?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Set your heart at ease, my beloved little sister! All
is well. Actually, you've caught me at the perfect
time. I was extolling your virtues to my friends!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Behold! This here is my trainer. Go ahead! Express
your salutations!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And this aloof Umamusume is Admire Vega! Hehe!
She's a dear and bosom friend of mine!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Huh? Says who?!

text_block_list.name: Opera O's Younger Sister
text_block_list.text:
Oooh, so they're your friends?! Nice to meet you
both! Thanks for keeping Opera O out of trouble!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Uhhh... Well... Sure...

text_block_list.name: Opera O's Younger Sister
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, well, I'll get out of your hair. I'm really
looking forward to your performance this year!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Did you hear that just now?! Ayabe said "sure"!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I am moved beyond words right now! To think
your earnest feelings would overcome your
shyness...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Hey, I was put on the spot...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Whatever...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Go out there and break a leg... for your sister.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ayabe! You bashful little thing, you. I accept your
encouragement with open arms!
